query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND expectedAnnualLoss != '0' THEN 1 END) as non_zero_count FROM supplyChainRisks
